g.style: font-weight:400;font-size:14px;font-family:ui-sans-serif, system-ui, '-apple-system', BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';text-anchor:start;mix-blend-mode:normal;fill:#000000;fill-rule:evenodd;stroke:none;stroke-width:1;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;stroke-miterlimit:10;stroke-dasharray:none;stroke-dashoffset:0
